view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of running consolidated versus per-location reports, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the expected results or outcomes of this scenario. While the linked use case describes the multi-location functionality, it does not include specific validations or traces that confirm the scenario behavior as supported or provide a clear failure report. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of evidence supporting the requirement.
